name: Amumu
title: The Sad Mummy
shortBio:
- Bandage Toss (Q) doesn't have extra charges
- Cursed Touch (P) reduces magic resist on basic attacks only

skins.name: Emumu
skins.description: When your friends let you down, the best thing to do is start a rock band driven by hard emotions.

skins.name: Little Knight Amumu
skins.description: A diminutive knight whose heart is brave and true, Sir Amumu of Shurima wants only to see peace reign the land in his lifetime. Considering that he's an undying, mummified princeling, he'll probably succeed.

skins.name: Infernal Amumu

chromas.name: Infernal Amumu (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2018.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2018.

skins.description: When ancient pyromancers unleashed the malevolent Infernals upon the world, they also unintentionally summoned younger, lonelier creatures. A mere spark compared to the fiery monsters now ravaging the land, Amumu seeks only friendship… unwittingly incinerating all those he touches.

skins.name: Hextech Amumu
skins.description: A mechanical boy intended as a playmate for wealthy children, Amumu has been long forgotten in the advent of newer and more advanced Hextech innovations. But a child has feelings, and within his artificial mind something has begun to awaken that will change the history of Hextech forever.

skins.name: Porcelain Amumu

chromas.name: Porcelain Amumu (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Porcelain Amumu (Golden Tiger)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Lunar Revel event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Lunar Revel event.

skins.description: Eternally young due to his bond with the Rat Relic, Amumu's innocence belies centuries of existence. He's been lonely in ages past, but no more: Lux is like his big sister, and Kindred is his… Kindred? Companionship hasn't stopped his occasional tantrums, of course, but at least now there's someone to shine his porcelain eyes after a nice cathartic cry.

skins.name: Dumpling Darlings Amumu

chromas.name: Dumpling Darlings Amumu (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

skins.description: Lonely soul Amumu traveled the world to find a cafe that he could call home. Despite his best efforts to win over his fellow chefs as an apprentice dumpling maker, all of his concoctions end up just a little too salty. Yet he holds onto hope that his dreams of friendship—and the perfect prawn recipe—are within reach one day.

passive.name: Cursed Touch
passive.description: Amumu's attacks reduce his target's Magic Resist for 3 seconds.

spells.name: Bandage Toss
spells.description: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.
spells.dynamicDescription: Amumu launches a bandage, pulling himself to the first enemy hit, <status>Stunning</status> them for @StunDuration@ second, and dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Despair
spells.description: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum health each second.
spells.dynamicDescription: <toggle>Toggle:</toggle> Amumu begins crying, dealing <magicDamage>@BaseDamage@ plus @TotalHealthDamage@% max health magic damage</magicDamage> to nearby enemies each second.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Tantrum
spells.description: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Amumu takes @PassiveDamageReduction@ reduced physical damage.

Active: Amumu deals @TantrumDamage@ magic damage to surrounding units. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced by @CooldownReduction@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
spells.description: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, applying his <keywordMajor>Curse</keywordMajor>, damaging and stunning them.
spells.dynamicDescription: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units, <status>Stunning</status> for @DebuffDuration@ seconds and dealing <magicDamage>@RCalculatedDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
